equivalence_argument: The settlement builder carries executor/payment and validator fields, but it no longer implements the invariant requirement that inclusion validator comes from VALIDATOR_ADDRESS with a non-zero fallback.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: No audited repo reads VALIDATOR_ADDRESS or applies a non-zero fallback for inclusion validator when encoding async settlement calldata; the builder uses payload attributes.suggested_fee_recipient instead.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ethereum/payload/src/ritual_async.rs encodes settlement calldata with executor.payment_address, contract_job.commitment_validator, and a caller-provided inclusion_validator.

crates/storage/codecs/src/alloy/transaction/async_commitment.rs and async_settlement.rs persist validator fields for current transaction types, but there is no async-exec codec path named in the invariant.

rationale: The detector now includes a commitment_validator in TxAsyncExec, the async-exec codec persists it, and the payload builder extracts both executor_address and commitment_validator from the system async-exec transaction instead of hardcoding the commitment validator in settlement calldata. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Async settlement calldata encodes the executor address and commitment validator from the async-exec system transaction, and encodes the inclusion validator from VALIDATOR_ADDRESS with a non-zero fallback address.
suggested_falsification_tests: Set VALIDATOR_ADDRESS to a distinctive validator, construct an async exec system transaction with a distinctive executor, round-trip it through the async-exec codec, build the settlement transaction, decode settleAsyncTransaction calldata, and assert the executor and commitment validator match the system transaction while the inclusion validator matches VALIDATOR_ADDRESS. Repeat without VALIDATOR_ADDRESS and assert the documented fallback addresses are used.
summary: Async settlement encoding lacks the VALIDATOR_ADDRESS inclusion-validator fallback.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Unset and set VALIDATOR_ADDRESS while building an async settlement; current code has no env read, so inclusion_validator follows suggested_fee_recipient rather than the documented fallback rule.
title: Async settlement encodes executor and validator recipients
